'''vavoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycotroph|mycotroph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycotroph|mycotroph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vavoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vævereth|vævereth]] || [[word:væverej|væverej]] || [[word:væveresh|væveresh]] || [[word:vævere|vævere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vavovoroth|vavovoroth]] || [[word:vavovoroj|vavovoroj]] || [[word:vavovorosh|vavovorosh]] || [[word:vavovoro|vavovoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vavoroth|vavoroth]] || [[word:vavoroj|vavoroj]] || [[word:vavorosh|vavorosh]] || [[word:vavoro|vavoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vavofroth|vavofroth]] || [[word:vavofroj|vavofroj]] || [[word:vavofrosh|vavofrosh]] || [[word:vavofrof|vavofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vavorotho|vavorotho]] || [[word:vavorojo|vavorojo]] || [[word:vavorosho|vavorosho]] || [[word:vavoroko|vavoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vavoroth|vavoroth]] || [[word:vavoroj|vavoroj]] || [[word:vavorosh|vavorosh]] || [[word:vavoro|vavoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vavorothol|vavorothol]] || [[word:vavorojol|vavorojol]] || [[word:vavoroshol|vavoroshol]] || [[word:vavorokol|vavorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vavorothotho|vavorothotho]] || [[word:vavorojojo|vavorojojo]] || [[word:vavoroshosho|vavoroshosho]] || [[word:vavoroko|vavoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vavorothon|vavorothon]] || [[word:vavorojon|vavorojon]] || [[word:vavoroshon|vavoroshon]] || [[word:vavorokon|vavorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vavorothoro|vavorothoro]] || [[word:vavorojoro|vavorojoro]] || [[word:vavoroshoro|vavoroshoro]] || [[word:vavorokoro|vavorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
